sgf:
(;FF[4]SZ[7]C[Black can capture white and there is only one way to do this. Moreover, black can capture this group even if white adds a stone at one of the marked points.

I have added only two moves in each wrong variation and it might be not obvious in some cases why that or this move is wrong. Adding 3-4 moves in each wrong line wouldn't be a problem, but then the SGF file would be way too big and the site would hang for a couple minutes before rendering the problem.]
